item.title: Teen Survives Family Tragedy
item.description: A teen is left as the lone survivor after witnessing her family’s end, in a true crime case centered on loss and survival.

media:content.media:title: Teen Survives Family Tragedy
media:content.media:description: A teen is left as the lone survivor after witnessing her family’s end, in a true crime case centered on loss and survival.

item.title: Jennifer’s Story of Survival
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares Jennifer’s survival story in a respectful, concise look at a difficult true-crime case.

media:content.media:title: Jennifer’s Story of Survival
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares Jennifer’s survival story in a respectful, concise look at a difficult true-crime case.

item.title: A Teen's 38-Day Ordeal
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a true crime story about a teen’s 38-day ordeal and survival.

media:content.media:title: A Teen's 38-Day Ordeal
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares a true crime story about a teen’s 38-day ordeal and survival.

item.title: When a Neighbor Becomes the Main Question
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a neighborhood story that raises questions and keeps the focus on what happens next.

media:content.media:title: When a Neighbor Becomes the Main Question
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares a neighborhood story that raises questions and keeps the focus on what happens next.

item.title: Missing Son Found After 11 Days
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a report about a missing son found in a parent’s basement after 11 days.

media:content.media:title: Missing Son Found After 11 Days

item.title: Did a 15-Year-Old End His Mother & Brother?
item.description: Brooke Makenna discusses a true crime story in this short video.

media:content.media:title: Did a 15-Year-Old End His Mother & Brother?

item.title: She Survived 10 Years Hidden By A School Guard
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a powerful story of survival and resilience, highlighting a decade spent hidden by a school guard.

media:content.media:title: She Survived 10 Years Hidden By A School Guard
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares a powerful story of survival and resilience, highlighting a decade spent hidden by a school guard.

item.title: A selfie helps reunite a family after 17 years
item.description: Brooke Makenna shares a story of reunion after 17 years, showing how a simple selfie helped bring a family back together.

media:content.media:title: A selfie helps reunite a family after 17 years
media:content.media:description: Brooke Makenna shares a story of reunion after 17 years, showing how a simple selfie helped bring a family back together.
